full_text:
Chen Xun йҷіжҒӮ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Xun (йҷіжҒӮ). Ally of Zhang Xiu and Gu Cheng, he helped improve their reputations. Sent to set up markets. Chen Xun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
